name: v-review
description: The future-check code review skill. Triggered by 'review this branch', 'review my PR', 'look at the diff'. Walks an 18-item hunt list (silent failures, unjustified additions, duplicate helpers, parallel-instance config drift, UI-only authz, etc.), runs security and language-specific reviewers in parallel where available, stages fixes, refuses to commit eagerly. Bundles five subagents — `csharp-reviewer`, `database-reviewer` (in-code data access), `database-schema-reviewer` (schema design), `playwright-test-reviewer` (E2E test discipline), `security-reviewer` (mandatory security pass with cascade analysis); suggests (does not auto-install) other companion skills and subagents — see README for the recommended list.

skillFamilies.fallback: Read ~/.claude/projects/<key>/memory/MEMORY.md directly. Specific tool is user preference; the act of searching memory is the rule.

recommendedCompanions.note: Not auto-installed. v-review probes availability at pre-flight and degrades gracefully when missing. Five subagents are BUNDLED with v-review and auto-available when the plugin is installed: `csharp-reviewer` (agents/csharp-reviewer.md), `database-reviewer` (agents/database-reviewer.md — in-code data access), `database-schema-reviewer` (agents/database-schema-reviewer.md — schema design), `playwright-test-reviewer` (agents/playwright-test-reviewer.md — E2E test discipline), `security-reviewer` (agents/security-reviewer.md — mandatory security pass with cascade analysis). See README for install hints on the rest.
